html:
Exclusive to:

The Blubber Suit is a Dress Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 4 Blubber, 2 Cloth and 2 Palm Leaf to craft, and an Alchemy Engine or a Sea Lab to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability. It also has a chance to be found in X Marks the Spot treasure chests.

It provides 100% insulation to Wetness and Rain. It is a tier 3 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a heat source during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 240.

Unlike the Snakeskin Jacket, the Blubber Suit offers no protection against Lightning strikes or electric shocks caused by Jellyfish.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Willow wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wendy wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • WX-78 wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Woodie wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wes wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Maxwell wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Webber wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Walani wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Warly wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wilbur wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wilba wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wormwood wearing a Blubber Suit.
  • Wheeler wearing a Blubber Suit.

Exclusive to:
Blubber Suit
"A disgusting way to stay dry."
×4 ×2 ×2
Tab
Tier
100% resistance
240
8 days
Does not stack
Perk
Provides 100% protection against Wetness.
Delays freezing during Winter.
Dropped by
"blubbersuit"
“Well, it's something.”
–Wilson
“It squishes when I move...”
–Willow
“Would rather wear a muscle suit!”
–Wolfgang
“Disturbing, but cozy.”
–Wendy
“DISGUSTING INSULATING PROPERTIES DETECTED”
–WX-78
“My mother would have been proud, I've put so much meat on my bones!”
–Wickerbottom
“It's not very flattering.”
–Woodie
“This is undignified.”
–Maxwell
“Smells faintly of ambergris.”
–Wagstaff
“Rue my suit öf fat, möisture!”
–Wigfrid
“A boy inside a spider inside a whale.”
–Webber
“Gross, but effective.”
–Walani
“Desperate times call for desperate attire.”
–Warly
“Ye has gotta be kiddin' me.”
–Woodlegs
“TOO SOLID FLESH NAUGHT MELT”
–Wilba
“Still warm”
–Wormwood
“Every adventure has a low point. This may be it.”
–Wheeler
The Blubber Suit is a Dress Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 4 Blubber, 2 Cloth and 2 Palm Leaf to craft, and an Alchemy Engine or a Sea Lab to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability. It also has a chance to be found in X Marks the Spot treasure chests.
It provides 100% insulation to Wetness and Rain. It is a tier 3 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a heat source during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 240.
Unlike the Snakeskin Jacket, the Blubber Suit offers no protection against Lightning strikes or electric shocks caused by Jellyfish.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ Đồ Blubber là một Trang phục được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó cần 4 Blubber, 2 Vải và 2 Lá Cọ để chế tạo, và Máy Luyện Kim hoặc Phòng Thí Nghiệm Biển để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 62,5% độ bền của nó. Nó cũng có cơ hội được tìm thấy trong các rương kho báu X Marks the Spot.

It requires 4 [[Blubber]], 2 [[Cloth]] and 2 [[Palm Leaf]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] or a [[Sea Lab]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 62.5% of its durability. It also has a chance to be found in [[X Marks the Spot]] treasure chests. It provides 100% insulation to [[Wetness]] and [[Rain]]. It is a ''tier 3'' warm clothing, increasing the time a [[character]] can be without a heat source during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has an [[Freezing#Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 240.
